x-enumeration-literals.name: Identity Verification/Proofing
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identity proofing, also known as identity verification or identity authentication, is the process of confirming that an individual's claimed identity is accurate and valid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Document Verification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Document verification is a process of verifying the authenticity and validity of documents presented by individuals or entities.
